label: House Alarm
info: House alarm: armed/disarmed by house_mode (Away→arm_away, Sleeping→arm_night, Home→disarm). Alarm state notifications for House+Shed to all people. Shed auto-arm = NFC 2h re-arm (see Alarm NFC Tags flow). Battery low alerts (residents). Built 19-06-2026, updated 30-06-2026.

name: people config
alarm notify engine
